title: ilex mitis var. mitis
intro: Ilex mitis var. mitis, also known as the Chinese holly or glossy-leaved holly, is a variety of holly native to China and Taiwan, characterized by its glossy, dark green leaves and red berries. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and alkaloids. The health benefits of Ilex mitis var. mitis include reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and treating various respiratory infections, as well as its potential anti-cancer properties. Ilex mitis var. mitis can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
